background.type: dark atmospheric smoke/mist gradient — NOT bright glowing circles
background.textArea: ultra-dark empty silence, pure black or near-black
background.auraStyle: subtle rim-light and atmospheric haze in deity aura color — NOT prominent concentric rings or circles
background.depthLayering: 3D parallax: first word extends LEFT into deity zone with NO gap; deity accessories overlap ON TOP of first word's left letters; colored line-2 text overlaps ON TOP of deity lower body — text and deity SHARE horizontal space

text.stackStyle: each word on its own visual line, stacked vertically to fill 85-95% of the right zone height — use the FULL vertical space
text.firstWordRule: the FIRST word is the ABSOLUTE BIGGEST element — 20-30% bigger than the second word, extends LEFT into deity zone with NO gap between deity and text

line1.sizeRelation: remaining line-1 words large but slightly smaller than first word
line1.fillRightZone: first word pushes LEFT into deity area, all words stretch to right edge

text.font: ultra-heavy black condensed (weight 900+), compressed wide letterforms
text.dropShadow: thick 3D extrusion shadow — 8-12px black offset creating depth/pop-out effect
text.textEffect: 3D extruded/beveled look with deep black shadow beneath each letter giving cinematic depth
text.mobileReadability: every word must be legible at phone-screen thumbnail size (120x68px)
